parent_chain: 0870/0871/0872 (design harmonization — created tokens but inlined implementations)
methodology: Token-first: replace hardcoded CSS values with design tokens and global classes. Zero visual change — output must be pixel-identical. Verify via grep counts before/after.

sessions.title: Frame & Smooth-Border Enforcement
sessions.scope: Replace hardcoded box-shadow: inset with .smooth-border class

sessions.title: Border-Radius Token Enforcement
sessions.scope: Replace hardcoded border-radius pixel values with $border-radius-* tokens

sessions.title: Table Header Pattern Extraction
sessions.scope: Extract repeated table header styling to shared mixin

sessions.title: Modal & Dialog Standardization
sessions.scope: Replace hardcoded dialog styles with shared classes

sessions.title: Transition & Animation Tokens
sessions.scope: Create transition tokens, replace hardcoded durations

sessions.title: Button Style Consolidation
sessions.scope: Ensure all buttons use Vuetify variants or global classes

sessions.title: Text Color Token Enforcement
sessions.scope: Replace hardcoded hex colors with SCSS tokens

sessions.title: Scrollbar Standardization
sessions.scope: Consolidate component-level scrollbar styles to global

sessions.title: Loading & Skeleton State Audit
sessions.scope: Audit all async operations for loading indicators

sessions.title: Toast & Notification Consistency
sessions.scope: Audit toast messages for plain language and recovery suggestions

sessions.title: Final Style Audit & Verification
sessions.scope: Full grep audit, all verification patterns must return zero

sessions.title: H4: Terminology & Icon Standardization
sessions.scope: Cancel/Close rules, delete icon standard, EmptyState component, edit/settings icon fix, date format outliers

sessions.title: H9: Silent Error Elimination & Message Quality
sessions.scope: Add toast to 20+ silent catch blocks, replace alert(), add recovery suggestions, field-specific validation
sessions.heuristic: Nielsen H9 — Help Users Recover from Errors
